[//]: # Define horizontal columns [//]: # beginning of the text block
- Kessler, Raja, Tapia & Busch (2024) -- **Towards Minimizing Efforts for Morphing Attacks - Deep Embeddings for Morphing Pair Selection and Improved Morphing Attack Detection.** *PLOS ONE* [link](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0304610) or *Arxiv* [link](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.18216) - Kessler, Philipp, Wilfer & Kostev (2023) -- **Predictive attributes for developing long COVID – a study using machine learning and real-world data from primary care physicians in Germany.** *Journal of Clinical Medicine* [link](https://www.mdpi.com/2077-0383/12/10/3511) - Kessler & Heinrich (2022) -- **Temporal frequency dependence of the polarity inversion between the upper and lower visual field in the pattern-onset steady-state visual evoked potential.** *Documenta Ophthalmologica* [link](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10633-022-09904-9) - Kessler, Rusch, Wende, Schuster & Jansen (2021) -- **Revisiting the effective connectivity within the distributed cortical network for face perception.** *Neuroimage: Reports* [link](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S266695602100043X) - Thome, Hohmann, Rusch, Smith, Kessler & Jansen (2021) -- **"I Spy with my Little Eye, Something that is a Face…”: A Brain Network for Illusory Face Detection.** *Cerebral Cortex* [link](https://academic.oup.com/cercor/article/32/1/137/6329814) - Kessler, Henniger & Busch (2021) -- **Fingerprints, forever young?** *Proceedings of the 25th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR)* [link](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/9412948?casa_token=RCm3BrcyUnEAAAAA:8Q57TyS3g6ingWm7bIfgDCDQqeHEcaxJ5gZ7z_lhbtdnQUR_EzDBg2ohM5r_onqPVqL7RjrhH8dPBw) - Sahraei, Hildesheim, Thome, Kessler, Rusch, Sommer, Kamp-Becker, Stark & Jansen (2021) -- **Developmental changes within the extended face processing network: A cross‐sectional functional magnetic resonance imaging study.** *Developmental Neurobiology* [link](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/dneu.22858) - Kessler, Schmitt, Sauder, … & Jansen (2020) -- **Long-Term Neuroanatomical Consequences of Childhood Maltreatment: Reduced Amygdala Inhibition by Medial Prefrontal Cortex.** *Frontiers in Systems Neurosciences* [link](https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fnsys.2020.00028/full) - Hildesheim, Debus, Kessler, ... & Jansen (2020) -- **The Trajectory of Hemispheric Lateralization in the Core System of Face Processing: A Cross-Sectional Functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging Pilot Study.** *Frontiers in Psychology* [link](https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fpsyg.2020.507199/full) - Kessler, Bach & Heinrich (2017) -- **Two-Tactor Vibrotactile Navigation Information for the Blind - Directional Resolution and Intuitive Interpretation.** *IEEE Transactions on Neural Systems and Rehabilitation Engineering* [link](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/7473877) [//]: # End of the text block
[Well ordered chaos](https://impact.h-da.de/en/well-ordered-chaos): Article about a data mining approach for predicting and explaining the success of kidney transplantation.
